title: eZWeight
description: A Mod that adds a weight system.
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/OOf22rG.png)

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/H3lTimPU&style=flat&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ezweight)


Have feedback or ideas? [Join our Discord.](https://discord.gg/jqBFMhnJPe)

**eZWeight** is a customizable weight system mod that adds a touch of realism and is perfect for survival or roleplay servers — or both! Players must manage their inventory carefully to avoid becoming overloaded and suffering penalties as a result.

> Fully configurable!

## 🎒 Main Features

*   📦 **Item-based weight system**, fully customizable via JSON files.
*   ⚖️ **Dynamic penalties when overweight**, such as no jumping, forced sneaking, or taking damage.
*   🧠 **Compatible with backpack mods and Curios**, automatically adjusting the total weight with extended inventories.
*   👁️ **Integrated HUD**, with visual indicators both on-screen and in the inventory for intuitive weight management.
*   ⚖️ **Reworked player weight calculation** uses dynamic weight calculations (base weight, food, strength, etc.).
*   🔫 **TACZ Guns**, full compability with guns, ammo and attachments. (only in forge version)
* 🎒 Backpacks weight **20% less** by default.
* ⚙️ Config: set custom % per backpack (e.g., **15%**) + max weight (e.g., **250 kg**).

***

## ✏️ Customization

eZWeight provides a flexible configuration through 4 core files:

*   `client-config.toml`: Adjusts HUD visibility and style.
*   `config.toml`: Controls base player weight and global penalties.
*   `levels.json`: Defines weight thresholds and associated negative effects.
*   `items.json`: Registers item weights, including support for modded items.

### 🛠️ Admin Commands

🔧 Easily configure item weights in-game with: `/ezweight gui`

⚙️ Useful commands for admins and players:

*   `/ezweight toggle <player>` — Enable or disable the system for a specific player.
*   `/ezweight toggleall` — Enable or disable the system globally.
*   `/ezweight info <player>` — View the current weight of any player.

You're welcome to include this mod in your modpack if you'd like! 😊

## ✨ Planned Features

* ⚖️ Overweight effects (configurable):
  * 🌊 Sink faster in water.
  * 🪜 No climbing ladders/ropes.

## 🔧 Target Versions

* **Forge**: 1.21.4 · 1.21.1 · 1.19.2 · 1.18.2 (maybe 1.16.5)
* **NeoForge**: 1.21.8–1.21.1 (latest range)


<details>
<summary>📌 Spanish Description</summary>


**eZWeight** es un mod de peso personalizable que añade un toque de realismo y es ideal para servidores de supervivencia, roleplay o ambos. Los jugadores deberán gestionar su inventario para no sobrepasar el límite de peso, ya que pueden recibir penalizaciones por ello.

> ¡Todo configurable!

### 🎒 Características Principales

* 📦 **Sistema de peso configurable por ítems**, totalmente personalizable mediante JSON.
* ⚖️ **Penalizaciones dinámicas al exceder peso**, como no poder saltar, daño por sobrepeso o movimiento forzado en sigilo.
* 🧠 **Compatible con mods de mochilas y Curios**, adaptando el peso total según el inventario extendido.
* 👁️ **HUD integrada**, tanto en pantalla como dentro del inventario.

### ✏️ Personalización

eZWeight es totalmente configurable mediante 4 archivos clave:

* `client-config.toml`: Ajusta los HUDs del cliente.
* `config.toml`: Configura el peso base del jugador y penalizaciones globales.
* `levels.json`: Define los niveles de peso y sus efectos.
* `items.json`: Registra los ítems y su peso, incluidos los de otros mods.

### 🛠️ Comandos para Admins

* `/ezweight gui`: Configura los ítems y su peso fácilmente.
* `/ezweight toggle <jugador>`: Activa o desactiva el sistema para un jugador.
* `/ezweight toggleall`: Activa o desactiva el sistema para todos.
* `/ezweight info <jugador>`: Muestra el peso actual del jugador.

Puedes usar este mod en tu modpack si lo deseas. 😊


</details>
